title: Top 25 GTM Engineering Voices of 2026
subtitle: The most influential builders, educators, and thought leaders shaping GTM Engineering
methodology: Ranked by cross-list appearances, community impact, and relevance to GTM Engineering. Sources include Clay ecosystem tracking, GTM Engineer Pulse, Brandlust community report, Utmost Clay experts directory, Go-to-Market Alliance, and independent creator analysis. We evaluated 60+ candidates and filtered for people who actively build, teach, or operate GTM engineering systems.

voices.name: Eric Nowoslawski
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Clay's first marketing contractor and the most visible GTM Engineer in the space. Built systems for Notion, Intercom, and Clay itself. Over 300 customers served. His LinkedIn breakdowns of enrichment workflows and outbound sequences set the standard everyone copies.

voices.name: Jared Waxman
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded GTM Engineer School with 4,500+ community members. Former Clay Club SF leader and VP Marketing. His Substack and podcast are the closest thing to a curriculum for the GTM Engineering role.

voices.name: Matteo Tittarelli
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded GTM Engineer School and publishes the Hypergrowth Substack. Mentored 35+ B2B SaaS startups on go-to-market. One of the first to codify GTM Engineering into a teachable framework with repeatable playbooks.

voices.name: Kellen Casebeer
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Created the GTM Cafe community and earned a spot in the Clay Hall of Fame. Coined 'message-market fit' as a methodology for outbound personalization. His tactical content on Clay workflows and deal execution gets heavy engagement from practitioners.

voices.name: Alex Choi
voices.title: Head of Sales Dev & GTM Engineering
voices.bio: Built HockeyStack's outbound engine from $0 to $74M pipeline in 8 months. One of the best case studies of what a GTM Engineer can do when given ownership of the full funnel. His posts on pipeline architecture are required reading.

voices.name: Adam Robinson
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: 142K+ LinkedIn followers and 55M+ impressions from 700+ posts. Built RB2B to $8M ARR. His content on website visitor identification and outbound infrastructure shapes how GTM Engineers think about signal-based selling.

voices.name: Nico Druelle
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Built GTM systems at Linear, Descript, Canva, and Attention. Now building agentic GTM systems at The Revenue Architects. His work on AI-powered revenue infrastructure is pushing the role toward its next evolution.

voices.name: Nathan Lippi
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Runs Clay Bootcamp, the most popular training program for aspiring GTM Engineers. His cohorts have trained hundreds of practitioners who now work at startups and agencies building outbound pipelines with Clay.

voices.name: Jorge Macias
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: YC S18 alumnus with 100+ GTM system implementations under his belt. Runs the only company named after the role itself. His engineering-first approach to outbound automation sets him apart from the ops crowd.

voices.name: Joe Rhew
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Applies software development practices to GTM automation. Runs ops on GitHub. His methodology of treating outbound systems like production code resonates with the technical end of the GTM Engineering spectrum.

voices.name: Brandon Charleson
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Air Force veteran turned full-stack developer turned GTM Engineer. Runs Top of Funnel, a Clay-certified agency. His unique background blends engineering discipline with sales automation in a way most practitioners can't match.

voices.name: Marina Ghilchik
voices.title: Co-Founder / Founding GTM Engineer
voices.bio: Co-founded MGSH Agency as a Founding GTM Engineer. Her take: GTM Engineers 'think like architects, build like operators, communicate like translators.' One of the clearest voices on what the role actually requires day to day.

voices.name: Michel Lieben
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Clay-certified and one of the most followed voices on AI-driven sales prospecting. ColdIQ's approach to cold outbound is heavily technical, blending enrichment waterfalls with AI personalization at scale.

voices.name: Patrick Spychalski
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Former Clay team member with a data science background. Co-founded The Kiln to build GTM systems for startups. His insider knowledge of Clay's architecture gives his content a technical depth most agency founders lack.

voices.name: Wesley Hoang
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Former engineer at Twitter, Apple, and Experian. Building the ops hub for GTM teams at Akaiza. His software engineering pedigree brings a rigor to GTM infrastructure that the role needs more of.

voices.name: Adam Wall
voices.title: GTM Infrastructure Pod Lead
voices.bio: Leads GTM infrastructure at Anthropic, building the systems that power one of the fastest-growing AI companies. Proof that GTM Engineering has gone from startup experiment to critical function at the biggest names in tech.

voices.name: Noah Adelstein
voices.title: Growth Team Lead
voices.bio: Leads growth at Rippling, one of the highest-valued B2B startups. His team's approach to automated outbound at enterprise scale is a blueprint for how GTM Engineering works inside large, fast-moving companies.

voices.name: Robert Jones
voices.title: GTM AI Team Lead
voices.bio: Leads the GTM AI team at Canva. His work integrating AI into Canva's go-to-market motion shows where GTM Engineering is headed: AI-native systems that replace manual prospecting entirely.

voices.name: Roman Ugarte
voices.title: GTM Engineer
voices.bio: GTM Engineer at Cursor, the AI code editor that developers can't stop talking about. Building outbound systems at one of the hottest dev tools companies. His role proves GTM Engineering is a first-class function at elite startups.

voices.name: Evan Peters
voices.title: RevOps & Strategy Lead
voices.bio: Leads RevOps and strategy at Notion alongside a team of automation engineers. Notion's GTM operation is one of the most sophisticated in B2B SaaS, blending product-led growth with targeted outbound.

voices.name: Balsa Kosic
voices.title: COO & Partner
voices.bio: Top-5 Clay certified partner with 500+ custom Clay tables built. OneAway's volume of implementations gives Balsa a pattern-matching ability that comes through in his content on what works and what doesn't.

voices.name: Naufal Nugroho
voices.title: Head of GTM Engineering
voices.bio: Built a cold email agency to six figures before taking the Head of GTM Engineering title at Understory. One of the few people who went from hands-on outbound execution to leading a GTM Engineering function.

voices.name: Davide Grieco
voices.title: Growth Team Lead
voices.bio: Leads growth at Verkada, building the automated outbound systems that power one of the fastest-growing security companies. His work sits at the intersection of physical security data and B2B pipeline generation.

voices.name: Madison Leonard
voices.title: Founder & GTM Leader
voices.bio: Led ClickUp's platform positioning before launching SaaS Secrets. 3x PMA Top Influencer. Her podcast delivers actionable GTM frameworks that bridge product marketing and outbound engineering.

voices.name: Horia Clement
voices.title: Co-Founder & CCO
voices.bio: VC-turned-operator who scaled customer acquisition at Integration.app before co-founding Membrane. His VC lens on GTM Engineering brings a unique perspective on what investors look for in pipeline infrastructure.
